food_name: # Food-level carbon footprint (kg CO2-equivalent per kg of food).
# Values are global mean post-farm + retail (cradle to retail).
# Resolution is food-category in the P&N dataset
# mapping is intentionally coarse. Where FDC foods share a category
# (e.g. "Pinto Beans" and "Black Beans" both map to "Pulses")
# Add rows as food coverage grows. Values rounded to 2 decimals; the
# P&N dataset's 10-90 percentile spread is wide
